SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-26-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:15am
Judge Pro Tem Nancy E. Hudgins, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeals, Respondent Musie Tsegay, appears in Pro Per; Tsung Choi appears in Pro Per as a representative for Royal Taxi Inc. Both parties are sworn, then Mr. Tsegay and Mr. Choi testify in the narrative. Judge Hudgins briefly questions both parties.
9:30am
The Matter is submitted. No new evidence is identified or admitted. (No evidence from the original Small Claims matter was in the file.)
